acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Merged origin/main at 03a79e1 into the PR branch, resolved the sole package.json conflict by preserving main's 2.1.0 release metadata and Harness's hrn contract, and found no conflict markers.
npm ci --ignore-scripts and npm test passed after the merge; the suite covers installer, packed standalone CLI, workflow context, child agent, and release/Homebrew behavior.
GitHub PR #9 reports state OPEN, mergeStateStatus CLEAN, and mergeable MERGEABLE at c84e142c31db97ec8c66c555d27c26a15df8fbd4.

commands.command: git fetch origin main && git merge --no-edit origin/main

remainingRisks: The existing untracked pnpm-lock.yaml remains intentionally excluded from this PR.
